description: Right side fragment: Letter addressed to Shemuel b. Sīd. In Hebrew. Dating: Early 17th century. In the upper margin of recto, it refers to the death of Yosef and to his son Shelomo b. Yosef. The sender also mentions seeing someone's "face before I perish." In the lower right margin, the sender mentions being ill, a scribe who has been sick for 40 days, and the death "of his six year-old grandson." Requires further examination.
description_he: מכתב בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
